title: Two items at the same location on Map

posts.author: lou.es (Lou)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have multiple items that need to be mapped at the same time. However, they have the same location so only the most recent one shows up. I am using the map widget on a dashboard with two connected boards.

Could this be implemented?
Thank you !

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: When using split mode, it shows all items also, not the ones that you have zoomed in on.
